name: COUGAR DuoFace Pro RGB White ATX Mid Tower Gaming Case, 390mm GPU supported, built-in Front 120mm ARGB Fan x3 & Rear 120mm ARGB Fan x1, with Mesh & Tempered Glass Front Panels
